title: NBA 2K Build as Life Frame
html: Stub. Yahir's 2020 QuestBridge metaphor: people are like NBA 2K builds — physical attributes are visible, but the intangibles (family of undocumented immigrants, alcoholic father, separated parents, focused mind) are what actually determine the player. Reconciliation with brother emilio happened over 2K sessions.

related.label: Time-capsule recording — Jan 2 2020 'recording with my life'
